revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''7-6-370

A long horizontal counter-balanced jib mounted on top of a slender tower, used to give total coverage of congested sites with just the one lifting device.

{{IALAFooter}}
